mission: v1.39.1 hoists Step 7.7 (dead-plugin cleanup) so it runs even when wizard versions match. v1.39.0 introduced Step 7.7 but Step 3 of skills/update/SKILL.md said 'If versions match: stop' — short-circuiting Step 7.7 for any user already on the latest wizard. Real bug: maintainer was on 1.39.0 with stale ~/.claude/settings.json plugin registration, /update-wizard exited at Step 3 saying 'up to date', Step 7.7 never ran, hook error kept firing. Fix updates Step 3's match-branch wording to invoke Step 7.7 first, then stop. Adds 'Runs regardless of version match' note to Step 7.7 itself as a future-edit guard. New regression test asserts both. Round 2 addresses 5 Codex findings: stale handoff, check-only bypass, untracked test file, false-green assertion 3, stale scanner test count.
success: (1) Step 3 match-branch wording explicitly invokes Step 7.7 before stopping AND honors check-only by NOT prompting/applying when check-only is set. (2) Step 7.7 contains an explicit 'runs regardless of version match' note. (3) tests/test-update-skill-step-7-7.sh has tightened assertion 3 (scoped to the specific match-branch line, not the whole Step 3 section). All assertions independently verifiable via mutation. (4) Test file is git-tracked. (5) Version bump 1.39.0 → 1.39.1 across all watched files. (6) CHANGELOG [1.39.1] entry above [1.39.0] documents the hoist. (7) Scanner test count corrected from 11 to 14 in docs.
failure: Step 3 wording adds 'Step 7.7' but doesn't actually order it before the stop. Step 7.7 'regardless of version' note is grep-passable but doesn't communicate the constraint. Test passes via shallow string-match without proving semantic ordering. Allowlist or jq pipeline silently regresses. CHANGELOG entry mentions wrong version. Stale 1.39.0 references left in any watched files. check-only short-circuit broken (cleanup mutates settings even when user only wanted a check). Test file still untracked.
fixes_applied: F1: Replaced .reviews/handoff.json with v1.39.1 hoist mission (was stale v1.39.0 scanner mission). Addresses round-1 finding 1.

F2: Edited skills/update/SKILL.md Step 3 match-branch to honor check-only: 'If versions match AND check-only NOT set: run Step 7.7, then stop. If versions match AND check-only set: report dead-plugin detection results without prompting or applying.' Also restated check-only precedence in Step 7.7. Addresses round-1 finding 2.
F3: git add tests/test-update-skill-step-7-7.sh (was untracked, CI would fail). Will be in the commit. Addresses round-1 finding 3.

F4: Tightened assertion 3 in tests/test-update-skill-step-7-7.sh to extract only the 'If versions match' paragraph (not the whole Step 3 section), then assert 'Step 7.7' appears IN THAT paragraph. Mutation test on a temp copy now correctly fails when the match-branch is reverted. Addresses round-1 finding 4.
F5: Updated scanner test count from 11 → 14 in CLAUDE_CODE_SDLC_WIZARD.md and skills/update/SKILL.md changelog example. Addresses round-1 finding 5.
verification_checklist: (F1-recheck) .reviews/handoff.json review_id is step77-hoist-001 (not community-scanner-001) and mission describes the v1.39.1 Step 7.7 hoist work.

(F2-recheck) skills/update/SKILL.md Step 3 match-branch explicitly handles check-only — verify both branches are documented (check-only → report-only; not-check-only → run Step 7.7 then stop). Step 7.7 itself should also note that check-only short-circuits the prompt/apply path.
(F3-recheck) git ls-files tests/test-update-skill-step-7-7.sh returns the path (file is tracked). Run bash tests/test-update-skill-step-7-7.sh and verify all 8 assertions pass.

(F4-recheck) Mutation test on tests/test-update-skill-step-7-7.sh: copy SKILL.md to /tmp, mutate ONLY the 'If versions match' paragraph to remove the 'Step 7.7' reference, run the test against the temp file via SKILL=tmp/path. Assertion 3 must FAIL (was previously a false green).
(F5-recheck) grep for '11 quality tests' or '11 tests' in CLAUDE_CODE_SDLC_WIZARD.md and skills/update/SKILL.md — should not appear in connection to community scanner. Should say 14.
(prior-a) Step 3 match-branch ordering still correct after F2 edits.
(prior-b) Step 7.7 'Runs regardless of version match' note still present + substantive after F2 edits.
(prior-h) Step 7.7 substantive content unchanged: allowlist (sdlc-wizard-local + sdlc-wizard-wrap), jq pipeline (del on enabledPlugins + extraKnownMarketplaces), timestamped backup intact.
(prior-i) Diff scope = the 10 files listed. No accidental edits to other skills/hooks.
(prior-j) ci.yml YAML valid; CONTRIBUTING.md test command list still copy-pasteable.
review_instructions: TARGETED RECHECK — not a full re-review. Read .reviews/handoff.json for fixes_applied list and verification_checklist. For each F1-F5 fix: verify against the specific certify condition from round 1. Do NOT raise new findings unless P0 (critical/security). New observations go in 'Notes for next review' (non-blocking). Mutation-test assertion 3 again to confirm F4 actually fixed the false green. End with: score (1-10), CERTIFIED or NOT CERTIFIED.
